displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
** Actual product may come in different brand, packaging or/and country of origin depending on the stock availability
Freshness Guarantee for Online Orders:
• We pick the freshest item(s) and deliver to your doorstep
• Opt for a refund within 3 days of delivery if your items are not delivered fresh
• Check out our refund policy for fresh in the T&C for more details
These bananas have a smooth bright yellow skin. It has a distinct sweetness and chewy texture grown in abundant sunlight, strong wind and wider temperature range at Highland.Goodness in a banana:
• Rich in Vitamin B6: Metabolise carbohydrates and fats, turning them into energy
• Contains Potassium: Maintain a healthy heart and blood pressure
• Contains fibre: Aids in digestive health

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
Ways to enjoy:
• Add it into your salad
• Use it as toppings for desserts such as ice cream
• Open-faced sandwich
• Add it into your smoothies

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Best consumed within 2 days of delivery
• Ripen the bananas in a fruit bowl at room temperature
• Once ripe, the bananas can be stored in the fridge; their skin will turn black, but the flesh should be good for a few more days
• Peel and chop overripe bananas into chunks and freeze for use in banana cakes and smoothies

metaData.Preparation:
Ways to enjoy:
• Add it into your salad
• Use it as toppings for desserts such as ice cream
• Open-faced sandwich
• Add it into your smoothies
metaData.Storage Information:
• Best consumed within 2 days of delivery
• Ripen the bananas in a fruit bowl at room temperature
• Once ripe, the bananas can be stored in the fridge; their skin will turn black, but the flesh should be good for a few more days
• Peel and chop overripe bananas into chunks and freeze for use in banana cakes and smoothies
